subject: Compounded GLP-1 marketing and labeling concerns
violations_summary: FDA cited the company in connection with the marketing and distribution of compounded GLP-1 products. See the linked FDA warning letter for the full text of the agency's concerns and the specific provisions of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act referenced.
